assertionResults.title: should delete shutdown server scenarios on primary startup

assertionResults.title: should update scenario state to STOPPING then SHUTDOWN

assertionResults.title: should register new client server dynamically

assertionResults.title: should handle client disconnect and cleanup

assertionResults.fullName: Server Lifecycle Management Scenario Persistence should persist server state across restarts
assertionResults.title: should persist server state across restarts
